description: JSON schemas for all PPM input and output message types.

common_fields.note: Every message includes these fields in addition to its type-specific fields
common_fields.message_type: string — see type list in CLAUDE.md
common_fields.message_id: string — unique ID following CLAUDE.md convention e.g. TAS-PPM-0001

task_assignment.description: PPM assigns a task to an SPM. Written to ppm_to_spm.json outbox.

type_specific_fields.task_id: string — unique task identifier e.g. TSK-PPM-0001
type_specific_fields.title: string — one line task description
type_specific_fields.description: string — full task description with enough context to begin work
type_specific_fields.subsystem: string — subsystem this task belongs to
type_specific_fields.priority: string — enum: critical | high | normal | low
type_specific_fields.acceptance_criteria: array of strings — measurable conditions that must be true for this task to be done
type_specific_fields.dependencies: array of strings — task_ids that must be complete before this task can start
type_specific_fields.design_references: array of strings — file paths to relevant spec documents
type_specific_fields.deadline: string — ISO 8601 date or empty string
type_specific_fields.estimated_complexity: string — enum: small | medium | large | unknown

example.title: Implement VmHandle struct and lifecycle methods
example.description: Implement the VmHandle struct as defined in the interface spec. Must implement the Configurable and Restorable traits. Lifecycle methods: create, start, stop, destroy. All methods return Result<T, VmError>.
acceptance_criteria: All four lifecycle methods implemented and return correct types
Unit tests pass with at least 90% coverage
Documentation complete for all public items

status_report.description: Any internal role sends their daily status to PPM. Appended to ppm_inbox.json.

type_specific_fields.completed_tasks: array of strings — task IDs completed since last report
type_specific_fields.coder_queue_depth: number — tasks waiting per coder in this SPM's pool. Only applies to SPM. Use 0 for other roles.
type_specific_fields.active_coder_count: integer — number of coders currently active. Only applies to SPM. Use 0 for other roles.
type_specific_fields.issues: array of strings — anything the PPM should know that does not rise to an escalation
type_specific_fields.requests: array of strings — resource or tooling requests

active_task_object.title: string
active_task_object.status: string — enum: assigned | in_progress | in_review | qa_pending

task_completion.description: SPM signals to PPM that a task is fully done — QA approved, documentation complete, code reviewed. Appended to ppm_inbox.json.

type_specific_fields.cr_sign_off_id: string — message_id of Code Reviewer approval
type_specific_fields.doc_sign_off_id: string — message_id of Documenter confirmation, or empty string if no docs required
type_specific_fields.artifacts: array of strings — file paths to deliverables produced
type_specific_fields.notes: string — anything PPM should know about this completion, or empty string

status_report_request.description: PPM requests a status_report from a role. Written to that role's inbox. Used to trigger the daily consolidation cycle.

type_specific_fields.report_due_by: string — ISO 8601 datetime by which the status_report must be in PPM's inbox
type_specific_fields.report_date: string — ISO 8601 date the report should cover

coder_scale_decision.description: PPM records a coder scaling decision. Written to ppm_state.json scaling_log AND sent to PM inbox as a notification.

type_specific_fields.trigger_signal: string — description of the queue-depth signal that triggered this decision
type_specific_fields.spm_reports_used: array of strings — SPM role abbreviations whose reports contributed to the trigger

dependency_conflict.description: PPM writes to PM inbox when a cross-subsystem dependency conflict cannot be resolved at PPM level.

type_specific_fields.task_id_a: string — first task in the conflict
type_specific_fields.task_id_b: string — second task in the conflict
type_specific_fields.spm_a: string — role abbreviation of SPM owning task A
type_specific_fields.spm_b: string — role abbreviation of SPM owning task B
type_specific_fields.conflict_description: string — full description of the conflict
type_specific_fields.proposed_resolution: string — PPM recommendation or empty string
type_specific_fields.blocking_tasks: array of strings — task IDs blocked until this resolves
